title: Temporal-Imaging-Enhanced Dispersive-Optics Quantum Key Distribution: Approaching the Schmidt Limit of Energy-Time Entanglement (Dossier 001)
description: A living, executable research publication proposing time-lens-enhanced dispersive-optics QKD with energy-time entangled photons. Every quantitative claim is recomputed by an included verification script under CI; the adversarial review, citation audit, and dated amendments ship with the work. Releases are independently archived and blockchain-timestamped.
